```r
# Tidy part from ex 2
swiss_gdp_tidy<-swiss_gdp |> 
  pivot_longer(colnames(swiss_gdp)[4:17],names_to = 'Year',values_to = 'count',names_transform = list(Year=as.integer)) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = 'Industries', values_from = 'count')
```
